content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "Attorney-review / no-legal-advice disclaimer is not included at the top of the document as required by the checklist; it appears near the end instead.", "fix": "Move or duplicate the attorney-review disclaimer section to the beginning of the amendment, before the title or immediately after it."}, {"problem": "Jurisdiction is not fully identified: governing law state is marked [TBD] and there is no jurisdiction/venue clause, while the checklist requires both governing law and jurisdiction identified.", "fix": "Add a forum selection / venue clause specifying courts/jurisdiction, and replace [TBD] with the applicable state or mark as [TBD jurisdiction]."}, {"problem": "Several checklist items are not addressed at all (market-standard benchmarks, jurisdiction-specific rules, flow-down obligations, NNN maintenance matrix, ADS defaults/Pakistan labour law table), even if only to note they are not applicable.", "fix": "Explicitly confirm applicability or non-applicability of each checklist item in the draft or in a short preface (e.g., \"Not applicable to this commercial lease amendment\"), or incorporate the required checks where relevant."}]}
